description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure elevated on short concrete piers, with a wide, overhanging gable roof in dark color. The front facade is dominated by a covered wooden porch with steps leading up, supported by wooden posts and railings, providing a welcoming entryway. The side and rear walls are mostly solid with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and structural simplicity. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker wood elements of the porch and roof structure. The building sits on a rectangular grassy plot, suggesting a suburban or park-like setting. The overall design is functional and modest, with a focus on outdoor living space and straightforward construction.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, light-colored walls, and a prominent wooden front porch, set on a grassy rectangular plot.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain light-colored wall with no visible windows or doors, and the overhanging gable roof.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the solid wall and a partial view of the wooden porch extending from the front.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the wide wooden porch with steps, railings, and the main entrance beneath the gable roof.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the porch extending along the front and a mostly solid wall with minimal openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal front and side windows, mostly solid walls
